title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!!? You're just going to abandon me?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: are being recalled by the Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How... do you see this playing out?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Please evacuate as quickly as you can!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There are still cheap slaves inside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Admiral Kizaru is on his way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Those!!? Those things are coming here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OY, OY, GRAMPS, DON'T BE RECKLESS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's all right, just stay still.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's already sounding! What're you doing!!?
